title: crotalaria sphaerocarpa
intro: Crotalaria sphaerocarpa is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family, and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its pods and seeds, which are known for their antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria sphaerocarpa include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to lower blood pressure and alleviate fever. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, where the leaves and pods are steeped in hot water to create a tea, or through decoction, where the seeds and roots are boiled in water to create a medicinal drink.
